description_long: This is a large, modern beachfront house surrounded by a dense arrangement of palm trees, with a sandy yard leading up to a backdrop of the ocean. The house is predominantly white, featuring clean lines, flat roofs, and multiple large windows that provide ample natural light and ocean views. The front approach is marked by a driveway and a landscaped path flanked by palm trees, leading to a prominent entryway. The property is enclosed by a low wall at the rear and sides, with the ocean backdrop suggesting a luxurious, private setting. The house appears to have two stories, with balconies and terraces integrated into the design. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on openness, outdoor living, and integration with the coastal environment.
description: A modern, white two-story beachfront house surrounded by palm trees, with large windows and flat roofs, set against an ocean backdrop.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, symmetrical palm tree landscaping, and the ocean backdrop.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the dense palm tree coverage and the side elevation of the house with visible windows.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the house, more palm trees, and the enclosing wall, with less emphasis on the ocean.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the sandy yard, palm trees, and the house's side elevation with terraces and windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with wide steps, a prominent door, landscaped path, and flanked by palm trees
